channel.title: Daily News (Personal Briefing)
channel.description: A personal morning news briefing covering AI, marketing, higher education, Canadian policy, BC local news, and global business.
channel.itunes:author: Daily News

item.title: Daily News for Wednesday, June 3, 2026
item.description: Two threads deserve your full attention today, Midya. First, the OpenAI brand crisis story is a masterclass in the limits of marketing — and a gift for your consulting pitch on AI brand strategy, because it illustrates exactly why CMO hires alone can't fix structural trust proble...
